---
title: "Media"
format: html
---


## Writing & Commentary

- [Montefiore Einstein feature: ICT team advancing care for transplant recipients](https://montefioreeinstein.org/news/2024/10/03/how-8-physician-team-infectious-disease-experts-helps-transplant-patients-thrive)

- [Here's What It Will Take to Grow HIV-Positive to HIV-Positive Transplant Access](https://www.medpagetoday.com/opinion/second-opinions/113782)

---

## Television & News Coverage

These segments highlight advances in HIV-positive to HIV-positive transplantation and the broader impact of the HOPE Act on transplant policy and patient access.

### HIV-Positive Grandmother Receives Historic Heart Transplant

<div class="video-container">
<iframe
  src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/JYCqTko6Ca4"
  title="HIV-positive heart transplant news segment"
  frameborder="0"
  allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
</div>

<div class="video-container">
<iframe
  src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/WWO-9bg-4Ng"
  title="News coverage"
  frameborder="0"
  allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
</div>

<div class="video-container">
<iframe
  src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/LN5DT8SmIdA"
  title="News coverage"
  frameborder="0"
  allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
</div>

---

## Podcast Appearances

### HIV to HIV Heart Transplant, Methenamine, and Much More  
*Apple Podcasts*

<div style="margin-top: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">

<iframe
  allow="autoplay *; encrypted-media *; fullscreen *"
  frameborder="0"
  height="175"
  style="width:100%;max-width:660px;overflow:hidden;border-radius:12px;"
  sandbox="allow-forms allow-popups allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation"
  src="https://embed.podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/hiv-to-hiv-heart-transplant-methenamine-and-much-more/id1499279708?i=1000580159015">
</iframe>

</div>
